## Checklist

- [ ] This change is intended to be releasable if merged to `main`
- [ ] CI should pass without relying on local-only state
- [ ] No internal-only files/folders are being introduced
- [ ] If this changes release behavior, README/ops docs were updated

## Release impact

- [ ] patch-safe
- [ ] requires coordinated minor/major release decision
- [ ] security-sensitive
